# docs: cross-guide consistency + numbers-verify-at-publish sweep (sequence LAST)

Part of #14310 · follow the content rubric pinned on #14310. Refs #14310.

**Problem:** facts drift across guides — model names, MCP-server count, Chroma topology, version, and the proof figures (commits, PRs/month, concept-node count).

**Acceptance Criteria**
- [ ] Single-source the drift-prone facts; reconcile contradictions across all touched guides.
- [ ] **Verify every number against live source at publish** (the proof figures in the intro / AgentOSOnYourCodebase) — no stale or rounded-wrong figures ship.
- [ ] Sequence after the content subs land (this is the reconciliation leaf).

**Files:** cross-cutting (the touched `learn/` guides + README).
